task_completion.description: Open the FZK-Haus model in Bonsai (BlenderBIM)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Blender open with the Bonsai add-on active and the FZK-Haus 3D architectural model loaded in the viewport.
Visual evidence of the agent using the space boundary generation tool in Bonsai, or inspecting the existing IfcRelSpaceBoundary elements in the outliner/properties panel.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Pset_SpaceThermalDesign' property set to an IfcSpace element
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Object Properties panel showing an IfcSpace element selected and the 'Pset_SpaceThermalDesign' property set being added or present.
A specific value entered into either the 'HeatingDryBulb' or 'CoolingDryBulb' field within the 'Pset_SpaceThermalDesign' property set in the Bonsai interface.

task_completion.description: Configure at least 3 IfcSpace elements with the thermal property set
task_completion.visual_evidence: Across multiple screenshots, evidence of the agent selecting different IfcSpace elements and applying the 'Pset_SpaceThermalDesign' property set to them (at least 3 distinct spaces).

task_completion.description: Save the enriched IFC project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save or export dialog in Blender showing the file being saved as 'fzk_energy_model.ifc' in the '/home/ga/BIMProjects/' directory, or terminal verification of the file creation.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender/Bonsai GUI to modify the IFC model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Blender interface, outliner, and properties panels, rather than editing the IFC file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: Properties were modified within the Bonsai properties panel.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Pset_SpaceThermalDesign' and dry bulb values should be visible in the BlenderBIM Object Properties UI.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file from Blender rather than just copying the original file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of a 'Save Project' or 'Export IFC' action in Blender, rather than a 'cp' command in the terminal without prior GUI modifications.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target output path: /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_energy_model.ifc. Required property set: Pset_SpaceThermalDesign. Required minimum spaces to configure: 3. Note: The original model inherently possesses 81 IfcRelSpaceBoundary elements, so the agent may simply verify their existence or re-generate them; either action is acceptable.
